mapper.sql: id as id , create_time as createTime , config_id as configId , pack_num as packNum , pack_voltage as packVoltage , pack_current as packCurrent , battery_pack_float_current as batteryPackFloatCurrent , environment_temperature1 as environmentTemperature1 , environment_temperature2 as environmentTemperature2 , bcapacity as bcapacity , hydrogen_concentration as hydrogenConcentration
mapper.insert: insert into stat_battery_pack (create_time, config_id, pack_num, pack_voltage, pack_current, battery_pack_float_current, environment_temperature1, environment_temperature2, bcapacity, hydrogen_concentration) values (datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), #{configId}, #{packNum}, #{packVoltage}, #{packCurrent}, #{batteryPackFloatCurrent}, #{environmentTemperature1}, #{environmentTemperature2}, #{bcapacity}, #{hydrogenConcentration})

insert into stat_battery_pack ( id, create_time, config_id, pack_num , pack_voltage , pack_current , battery_pack_float_current , environment_temperature1 , environment_temperature2 , bcapacity , hydrogen_concentration ) values
( #{item.id} , datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'localtime') , #{item.configId} , #{item.packNum} , #{item.packVoltage} , #{item.packCurrent} , #{item.batteryPackFloatCurrent} , #{item.environmentTemperature1} , #{item.environmentTemperature2} , #{item.bcapacity} , #{item.hydrogenConcentration} )
